issue_title: [BUG] Awards from most recent completed season don't show.
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
When looking at awards/the current champion on the homepage, it will show up to the "previous" season. This isn't quite right, as if your current season ID is a "completed" season, it should also include that. This is for leagues that haven't started back up yet, but the season
test_description_zh: 在联赛当前赛季已完赛但新赛季尚未开始的状态下，访问首页，查看奖项展示区域和当前冠军信息，确认最近一个已完成赛季的奖项和冠军数据是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 首页应正确显示最近已完成赛季的奖项信息和当前冠军，包括该赛季的完整数据，而不是仅显示到上一个赛季的内容。
